iotanalytics.dataset.action.ActionName.Docs: The name of the data set action by which data set contents are automatically created.

iotanalytics.dataset.action.ContainerAct.Docs: Information which allows the system to run a containerized application in order to create the data set contents. The application must be in a Docker container along with any needed support libraries.

iotanalytics.dataset.action.QueryAction.Docs: An "SqlQueryDatasetAction" object that uses an SQL query to automatically create data set contents.
